# GYEON Q²M Tire Express

- 1L - $45.00 CAD (SKU: 2384, Barcode: 8809432674788, Weight: 1000g)

Product images:
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-tire-express-500ml.webp?v=1720223055
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/GYEON-Q2M_TireExpress_1000ml_2020-3000.png?v=1738364881
- https://carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/GYEON_Q2M_TireExpress_4000ml_2020_1ef0b3d2-4b7b-4763-a85a-54d513551cbf.png?v=1738364881

## Fast and durable

Being water-based, Q² Tire Express is extremely easy to apply and allows for both dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require rubbing into the surface like GYEON's SiO2-infused Q² Tire Coating.

## Mature Satin finish

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural, and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

## Tire Conditioner

Conditions and shines your tires at the same time; the conditioning ability will keep your tires supple and prevent them from cracking or splitting prematurely.

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tires. With a simple and straightforward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tire dressing.

TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let it dry. A subtle, factory-fresh look will be the result.

## Description

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate daily tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the "factory fresh" look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tyres. With a simple and straight forward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tyre dressing. TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml/ set
DURABILITY: >2 washes

### MATTE LOOK

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

### QUICK & EASY DAILY TYRE DRESSING

Being water based, it's extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q² Tire.

## FAQ

Q: How is it applied?
A: It's as simple as wipe and done. It can be applied to both wet and dry tires. Ensure optimal surface preparation with the use of Q²M TireCleaner.

Q: Is it shiny, satin or matte?
A: GYEON Tire Express will produce a satin finish but can be further buffed down to matte. It will also dull down over time to a deep matte finish.

Q: What's the difference between Tire and Tire Express?
A: Tire Express is water-based and can be applied while the tires are still wet. It's meant to be used as a 'fast dressing' and does not require preparation as thorough as GYEON Tire. Tire Express can also be used on other rubber surfaces, such as weather seals, to restore and protect them.

Q: Will it sling?
A: No, it will not sling. The reason why something will sling is if too much product is applied without buffing it down. Also, ensure there are no products in the tire treads; make sure those are cleaned up as well.

Q: How long does it last?
A: Up to a month or so.

Q: What's the layering time?
A: About 15~30 minutes.

Available in 500ml, 1 Litre & 4 Litre Bottles

# Q²M TIRE EXPRESS

## Exterior / maintenance

### Quick and easy tyre dressing for everyday use.

Q²M Tire Express is an everyday tyre and rubber dressing designed to restore a clean and factory fresh appearance. It offers a simple application and delivers a natural, matte visual effect that lasts for hundreds of miles, even in wet conditions.

Product image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_tire-express_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png

## The quick and easy way to make your tyres look clean and fresh.

Q²M Tire Express simplifies tyre maintenance by providing fast application and consistent visual results. Its water based formula allows use on dry or wet tyres and creates a self cleaning layer that helps keep tyres looking clean.

Key Benefits:
- Repels dirt
- Factory fresh look
- Dry and wet application

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

Capacities: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
Real World Lifespan: >2 washes
Consumption: 10-15ml/ set

## HOW TO USE

1. Apply Q²M Tire Express to clean tyres.
2. Spread evenly using a tyre applicator or brush.
3. Allow the product to level on the surface.
4. Wipe off excess if needed.
5. Let the tyre dry before driving.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: Does Q²M Tire Express leave a glossy finish?
A: No. It leaves a natural matte appearance.

Q: Can it be applied on wet tyres?
A: Yes. It can be applied on dry or wet rubber.

Q: How long does the visual effect last?
A: It lasts for multiple washes depending on conditions.

Q: Is it easy to apply?
A: Yes. It spreads easily with minimal effort.

Q: Does it replace Q² Tire?
A: No. It is an everyday dressing, while Q² Tire is a long term coating.
